positive: A central, symmetrical arrangement of bioluminescent celestial flora and swirling nebulae. The main subject is a highly stylized, symmetrical cosmic mandala design. Elements include elegant, curving vines resembling aurora borealis, interspersed with abstract glowing celestial flowers and geometric constellations. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo, cosmic sapphire, ethereal teal, and pops of vibrant magenta and electric gold. Style should be neo-futuristic, detailed line art combined with soft, atmospheric glow effects, reminiscent of intricate stained glass and liquid crystal. Focus on clean silhouettes and high contrast against a midnight black background. Perfect for repeating pattern or central graphic placement on apparel.
